steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request refund of EUR 3,607.50 overpayment on Nokia Oyj dividend (account 2901234567)
Provide calculation showing correct withholding under FI-NO treaty should be EUR 28,867.50 (15%) not EUR 32,467.50
Submit formal reclaim with Finnish Tax Administration if custodian cannot process direct refund
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement for streamlined processing between Finland and Norway
